case_title: WALKER,JACQUELINE Y. VS BAYSHORE TEXACO SERVICE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $800.00 FILED BY WALKER,JACQUELINE Y. AS TO DEFENDANT BAYSHORE TEXACO SERVICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-06-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
INVALID SERVICE AS TO BAYSHORE TEXACO, NO MAILING DONE ON SUBSERVICE.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WALKER,JACQUELINE Y. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BAYSHORE TEXACO SERVICE DEFT TO RETURN CAR TO PLFT "AS IS" OR PLFT TO PAY $300.00 FOR DEFT TO REPLACE GASKETS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
